name: Kelli's Mounds Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Vanilla wafer crumbs or Oreo cookies, crushed
Mix the crust ingredients together and press into the bottom and up the sides of a springform pan
1 teaspoon Coconut extract or 1 tablespoon coconut-flavored liqueur (and 1/2 cup coconut-flavored extract)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating after each addition.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each egg is incorporated.
4. Stir in the heavy cream, cornstarch, coconut extract (and liqueur), and chopped almonds.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Place a pan of water on the bottom rack of the oven.
7. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 300°F and continue baking for an additional hour, or until set.
9. Run a knife around the edge of the cake.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely.
11. Top with melted chocolate and whole almonds before serving.
